title: HPE security advisory (AV26-727)
description: On July 21, 2026, HPE published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Include was a critical update for the following:
products: HPE Aruba Networking Private 5G Core   versions 1.26.1.1 and prior
HPE Aruba Networking EdgeConnect SD-WAN Gateways   multiple versions and platforms
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
